name: Smart Energy Grid AI
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure IoT Hub
services.purpose: Smart meter and grid sensor telemetry ingestion — voltage, frequency, load, renewable generation

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for demand pattern analysis, grid optimization reasoning, outage root cause, and operator reports

services.name: Stream Analytics
services.purpose: Real-time grid telemetry processing — load balancing signals, frequency deviation, renewable intermittency

services.name: Azure Digital Twins
services.purpose: Grid topology digital twin — substations, transformers, feeders, DERs, real-time state synchronization

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Demand forecasts, grid state history, optimization decisions, outage records, maintenance logs

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Grid API — demand forecasting, load balancing orchestrator, optimization engine, operator dashboard

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: IoT device certificates, SCADA credentials, API keys, encryption keys for critical infrastructure

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Forecast accuracy, grid optimization effectiveness, API latency, system reliability metrics

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine grid status summaries, reserve GPT-4o for complex optimization decisions and outage analysis — saves 65% on AI costs
Downsample smart meter telemetry at the edge (15-min intervals for billing, 1-sec only during events) — reduces IoT Hub and Stream Analytics costs by 80%
Use Digital Twins query API for topology lookups instead of rebuilding graph in memory — reduces compute requirements
Partition Stream Analytics by grid zone — allows independent scaling per region and avoids over-provisioning
Archive historical grid telemetry older than 90 days to cool storage — keeps Cosmos DB costs predictable
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
